hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "\b(terragrunt|terraform|tofu)\b" && echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "\b(apply|destroy)\b" && printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Terraform/Terragrunt apply/destroy — review the plan and confirm before mutating infrastructure."}}'; exit 0
